question_zh: 找出购买过电子产品的客户姓名和对应订单总金额。
schema_text: TABLE customers(customer_id, customer_name, city, segment); TABLE orders(order_id, customer_id, product_id, order_date, quantity, amount); TABLE products(product_id, product_name, category, unit_price);
gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_amount FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN products AS p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Electronics' GROUP BY c.customer_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question_zh: 统计每个部门在 2024-03 的总薪资支出。
schema_text: TABLE departments(department_id, department_name, city); TABLE employees(employee_id, employee_name, department_id, title, hire_date); TABLE salaries(employee_id, salary_month, base_salary, bonus);
gold_sql: SELECT d.department_name, SUM(s.base_salary + s.bonus) AS total_cost FROM departments AS d JOIN employees AS e ON d.department_id = e.department_id JOIN salaries AS s ON e.employee_id = s.employee_id WHERE s.salary_month = '2024-03' GROUP BY d.department_name ORDER BY total_cost DESC;

question_zh: 列出选课人数不少于 2 人的课程名称和选课人数。
schema_text: TABLE students(student_id, student_name, grade, major); TABLE courses(course_id, course_name, credits, teacher_name); TABLE enrollments(enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, semester, score);
gold_sql: SELECT c.course_name, COUNT(*) AS enroll_count FROM enrollments AS e JOIN courses AS c ON e.course_id = c.course_id GROUP BY c.course_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY enroll_count DESC, c.course_name ASC;

question_zh: 查询购买总金额最高的城市。
schema_text: TABLE users(user_id, user_name, city, vip_level); TABLE items(item_id, item_name, category, price); TABLE purchases(purchase_id, user_id, item_id, purchase_date, quantity, paid_amount);
gold_sql: SELECT u.city, SUM(p.paid_amount) AS total_paid FROM purchases AS p JOIN users AS u ON p.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.city ORDER BY total_paid DESC LIMIT 1;
